title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; chat, stream, embeddings.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model manager, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, stream, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat and manage models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Rust; chat, model switcher, markdown preview.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Bring local Ollama models into VS Code as a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama chat pane and commands.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot starter that autoconfigures an Ollama Java client bean.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and embeddings support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama; chat, stream, pull, and manage models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot wrapper for Ollama; private and group chats with local LLMs.
